sourcesContent:
export const palette = {
  teal: {
    50: '#f0fdfa',
    100: '#ccfbf1',
    400: '#2dd4bf',
    500: '#14b8a6',
    600: '#0d9488',
    700: '#0f766e',
    900: '#134e4a',
  },
  amber: {
    400: '#fbbf24',
    500: '#f59e0b',
    600: '#d97706',
  },
  red: { 500: '#ef4444' },
  green: { 500: '#22c55e', 100: '#dcfce7' },
  gray: {
    50: '#f9fafb',
    100: '#f3f4f6',
    200: '#e5e7eb',
    300: '#d1d5db',
    400: '#9ca3af',
    500: '#6b7280',
    600: '#4b5563',
    700: '#374151',
    800: '#1f2937',
    900: '#111827',
  },
  white: '#ffffff',
  black: '#000000',
};

export const lightColors = {
  primary: palette.teal[600],
  primaryLight: palette.teal[100],
  primaryDark: palette.teal[700],
  accent: palette.amber[500],
  background: palette.gray[50],
  surface: palette.white,
  surfaceSecondary: palette.gray[100],
  border: palette.gray[200],
  text: palette.gray[900],
  textSecondary: palette.gray[500],
  textInverse: palette.white,
  success: palette.green[500],
  successBg: palette.green[100],
  error: palette.red[500],
  errorBg: '#fee2e2',
  shadow: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.08)',
  overlay: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.4)',
  tabBar: palette.white,
  card: palette.white,
  statusBar: 'dark' as const,
};

export const darkColors: typeof lightColors = {
  primary: palette.teal[400],
  primaryLight: palette.teal[900],
  primaryDark: palette.teal[500],
  accent: palette.amber[400],
  background: palette.gray[900],
  surface: palette.gray[800],
  surfaceSecondary: palette.gray[700],
  border: palette.gray[700],
  text: '#f9fafb',
  textSecondary: palette.gray[400],
  textInverse: palette.gray[900],
  success: palette.green[500],
  successBg: '#14532d',
  error: palette.red[500],
  errorBg: '#7f1d1d',
  shadow: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.3)',
  overlay: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.6)',
  tabBar: palette.gray[800],
  card: palette.gray[800],
  statusBar: 'light' as const,
};
